data.title: As a developer, I can trust batch-2 test files (27-52) are SIGPIPE-safe
data.description:
## Description

**What**: Replace all echo|grep -q patterns in batch 2 (files 27-52 alphabetically)
**Why**: Extends SIGPIPE-safe coverage to the next 26 test files
**Scope**:
- IN: 26 files in batch 2
- OUT: All other batches

## Done Definitions

- When this story is complete, zero echo|grep -q patterns remain in the 26 batch-2 files
  ← Satisfies: "Zero echo ... | grep -q patterns remain in tests/"
- When this story is complete, all tests in the 26 batch-2 files pass
  ← Satisfies: "All replaced patterns preserve original matching semantics"
- When this story is complete, unit tests written and passing for all new or modified logic

## Considerations

- [Testing] Same flag-to-bash mapping as batch 1
